metadata.description: Cross-engine skills + agent substrate for long-running engineering agents. Ships `desk` (workspace substrate — tracks, tasks, friction, lessons, lifecycle skills, MCP server) and `work-suite` (ideate, plan, execute, merge, stay in turn while waiting, plus no-human-gates autopilot and inch-worm improvement loops). Engine-agnostic; works on Claude Code, Copilot CLI, and Codex.

plugins.name: desk
plugins.description: A quiet workspace substrate for long-running engineering agents: tracks, tasks, friction notes, lessons, lifecycle skills, and an MCP server for desk CRUD plus search. Ships a default 'worker' agent that makes the plugin standalone-functional; overlays (corporate, autonomous, personal-coding) layer their own agents on top.

plugins.name: work-suite
plugins.description: The workflow primitive used by orchestrator agents: work-ideator (explore), work-planner (scope), work-doer (execute with TDD), work-merger (PR + merge) — plus autopilot (no-human-gates full-delivery and continuation discipline), stay-in-turn (CI/deploy wait discipline), inch-worm (open-ended improvement loop), and visual-qa-dogfood (screenshot-backed UI/layout review). Vendor-neutral; companion to desk.
